message:
STEP 1: Log in if prompted (same TikTok account you use for @aibiblegospels_).

STEP 2: Click into the 'Ai-Bible-Gospels' app.

STEP 3: Find the 'App info' / 'Basic information' section (usually the first tab / top of the page).

STEP 4: Change the App name from 'Ai-Bible-Gospels' to exactly: AI Bible Gospels  (with spaces, no hyphens)

STEP 5: Save changes. Then click 'Submit for review' (or 'Resubmit').

Close this prompt once you've submitted (or if you hit a snag and want help).
